name: Torex Gold Resources Inc.
description: Torex Gold Resources Inc. is a Canadian gold mining company and Mexico's largest gold producer, focused on its 100%-owned Morelos Complex situated in the Guerrero Gold Belt, approximately 180 km southwest of Mexico City. The Morelos Complex encompasses the producing Media Luna Underground, ELG Underground, and ELG Open Pit mines, along with the development-stage EPO Underground Project, all fed through a central processing plant. The company is firmly in the production stage, targeting 420,000–470,000 gold-equivalent ounces annually, with gold as the primary product alongside silver and copper by-products.
